fees.paymentDetails: Payments should be strictly made to the Fesola International Zenith Bank Account: 101xxxxxx.

faq.question: Do you offer school bus services?
faq.answer: Yes, we have ultra-modern air-conditioned buses covering Ikeja, Agege, and Ogba routes.

faq.question: Are lunches provided?
faq.answer: Yes, we serve highly nutritious hot meals curated by our in-house pediatric nutritionist.
